title: Lehoo Castle Dino Construction Truck Sit and Spin Toys for Toddlers 1-3 Boys, 360° Toddler Spinning Seat with Lights and Music, Sensory Toys Christmas Birthday Gift for Kids Age 2 3 4 5
features: EXCITING DINO-CONSTRUCTION SPIN: Watch as dinosaurs take the driver's seat! This unique dinosaur sit and spin sparks imaginative adventures and active play, while developing kids’ motor skills and body coordination through safe, energetic spinning, indoors or outdoors. It's an ideal spinning activity toy for toddlers 1-3, 2-4

LED LIGHTS & MUSIC: Every spin triggers 3 cheerful songs and 2 softly flashing lights. With 3 simple modes, kids can customize their play - with Lights & Music, Lights Only, or just Silent spinning. Features a gentle glow-in-the-dark effect and adorable dinosaur-on-truck designs, the spin seat delivers a truly engaging multi-sensory experience

SPIN INTO GROWTH: With every 360° spin, kids learn to control speed and direction. By twisting to spin faster, slower, forward, or backward, they practice and master crucial balance, coordination, motor skills and concentration. This sit n spin toys for toddlers 2-4 is an ideal sensory development tool for preschoolers, including those with autism

SAFE & STURDY SPIN: Crafted from safe and stable material, our sit-and-spin toy offers an ergonomic non-slip handle, smooth rounded edges, and a sturdy ABS construction that supports up to 130 lbs of weight. With its roomy 17.5-inch diameter, it allows 2 kids to sit and play together. Assembly is quick and easy - just snap, screw, and play! (2 AA batteries required, not included)

THE PERECT SENSORY GIFT: This spinning chair builds lasting bonds through play - A parent's gentle push sends their child into a joyful spin, turning simple moments into cherished family memories. By promoting sensory exploration and early development, it makes a thoughtful gift for any child who loves dinosaurs and trucks, including those on the autism spectrum
